description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a mix of brick and light-colored exterior walls, featuring a dark gable roof over the main section and flat roofs over the rear extensions. The front facade includes a driveway with two parked cars, a small lawn, and a prominent entryway with a glass door and large windows. The house has a combination of rectangular and bay windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house features a private patio area with potted plants and a balcony on the upper floor. The side elevations show a clear distinction between the brick and lighter wall materials, as well as the transition between the gable and flat roof sections. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with functional outdoor spaces and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of brick and light-colored walls, a dark gable roof, large windows, and a driveway with two cars. The design features both flat and pitched roof sections, a private patio, and a prominent glass entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entryway with glass door, bay windows, and a dark gable roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brick wall, flat roof extensions, and partial view of the driveway and cars.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof sections, balcony, patio with potted plants, and large windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the brick wall, transition between roof types, and partial view of the patio and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay and large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door, small steps, and is flanked by large bay windows and a landscaped front lawn.
